data.name: Gamer Girl Adventure
data.detailed_description:
Gamer Girl Adventure: 激情、丑闻与高分的故事

踏入凯特那充满活力、混乱却又不可抗拒的性感世界——一位年轻的女玩家，她的人生即将以难以想象的方式升级。

凯特不仅仅是个大学生；她是成人直播界的新星，是一位聪慧过人的数学天才，也是一个能吸引所有人的魅力旋风。她的生活由深夜游戏马拉松、复杂的方程式和火辣的线上表演组成。她还与那位神秘而诱人的扶她继母同住——这段关系既复杂又令人兴奋。

但真正的游戏才刚刚开始。凯特一边与可爱的女同学展开温柔的恋情，一边又与火辣的数学教授陷入危险的激情之中，她在玩火。她沉迷于这种刺激，相信自己能掌控一切。然而，任何高分挑战最终都会迎来「Game Over」的时刻。

当疯狂的冒险失控并导致戏剧性的逮捕时，她的世界彻底崩塌，双重生活面临全面曝光的威胁。 凯特能否凭借智慧与魅力化解丑闻，还是她对极致刺激的追求终将让她坠落？

沉浸在这款难忘的成人视觉小说体验中，您将收获：

  • 扣人心弦、情感充沛的故事： 这不仅仅是诱惑的故事；更是对复杂少女人生的深度探索。故事充满激情、嫉妒、艰难选择和意想不到的后果，从头到尾让你紧张不已。

  • 令人难忘的角色阵容： 结识多样而精美的角色，每个人都有自己的欲望、秘密和动机。从给予安定的甜美女友，到承诺禁忌快感的强势教授，再到独特而神秘的继母，你的关系将塑造整个故事。

  • 令人屏息的高质量美术： 沉浸于视觉震撼的世界。每一幕都细致入微，从传神的日系角色设计到生动的场景环境，都让凯特的生活鲜活呈现。

  • 全角色专业配音： 故事因完整的专业配音而栩栩如生。听见每一句低语、每一声笑声与每一丝紧张，让互动真实而动人。

投入《Gamer Girl Adventure》——在这里，追寻爱情、欲望与完美直播，变成最危险的游戏。你准备好按下「Start」了吗？

data.short_description: 讲述一位女玩家巧妙维持两段秘密恋情，直到警察到来让她的双重生活轰然崩塌的故事。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: Legal Information: All images and artworks featured in the game are objects of intellectual property and are protected by copyright. The developer holds full and exclusive rights to commercially utilize the aforementioned artworks provided by the artist, within the context of creating and distributing this game.

data.name: Gamer Girl Adventure
data.detailed_description:
Gamer Girl Adventure: A Story of Passion, Scandal, and High Scores

Step into the vibrant, chaotic, and irresistibly seductive world of Kat – a young gamer whose life is about to level up in ways she never imagined.

Kat is more than just a college student; she's a rising star in the world of adult streaming, a math prodigy with a sharp mind, and a whirlwind of charisma that draws everyone to her. She lives in a whirlwind of late-night gaming sessions, complex equations, and steamy online shows, sharing her home with her enigmatic and alluring futanari stepmother—a dynamic that is as complicated as it is exciting.

But Kat's real game is just beginning. Juggling a tender romance with her adorable girlfriend from college and a dangerously passionate affair with her scorchingly hot math professor, Kat is playing with fire. She thrives on the thrill, believing she can balance it all. However, every high-score run must eventually face a "Game Over" screen.

Her world shatters when her wild adventures spiral out of control, leading to a dramatic arrest that threatens to expose her double life to everyone she cares about. Can Kat use her wit and charm to navigate the scandal, or will her quest for the ultimate thrill be her downfall?

Immerse yourself in an unforgettable adult visual novel experience, featuring:

  • A Gripping, Emotionally Charged Story: This isn't just a tale of seduction; it's a deep dive into the life of a complex young woman. Experience a narrative filled with passion, jealousy, difficult choices, and surprising consequences that will keep you on the edge of your seat from start to finish.

  • A Cast You'll Fall in Love With: Meet a diverse and beautifully designed cast of characters, each with their own desires, secrets, and motivations. From the sweet girlfriend who offers stability to the dominant professor who promises forbidden pleasure, and the mysterious stepmother with a unique presence, your relationships will shape the story.

  • Breathtaking, High-Quality Artwork: Lose yourself in a visually stunning world. Every scene is rendered with incredible detail, from the expressive, anime-inspired character designs that convey a spectrum of emotions to the vibrant and immersive environments that bring Kat's life to life.

  • Full Voice Acting for All Characters: The story leaps off the screen with a complete professional voice-over. Hear every whisper of passion, every burst of laughter, and every note of tension, making each interaction feel real and deeply personal.

Dive into "Gamer Girl Adventure" – where the quest for love, lust, and the perfect livestream becomes the most dangerous game of all. Are you ready to press start?

data.short_description: The story of a gamer girl who expertly juggled two secret romances, until her double life came crashing down with the arrival of the police.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
